steps.name: domain-docs
steps.summary: Added Solution Revision Number domain docs, v3 catalog architecture contract, manual validation checks, and ADR 0027 for #n commit messages.

steps.name: catalog-revision
steps.summary: Implemented Solution Catalog v3 with language solutionRevisionNumber normalization and merge result revision calculation.

steps.name: commit-message-contract
steps.summary: Made GitHub solve commit messages require solutionRevisionNumber and append #n suffix with client and sync test coverage.

steps.name: sync-payload-recalculation
steps.summary: Recalculated GitHub commit files and #n messages together from the latest Solution Catalog, including conflict retry payloads.

steps.name: retry-recalculation
steps.summary: Kept Retry Bundle commitMessage compatibility while verifying retry commits recalculate #n messages from the latest Solution Catalog.

steps.name: integration-validation
steps.summary: Validated Solution Revision Number integration, aligned v3 docs, and passed typecheck/test/build.
